history.content:
<thought>
I see the goal G two cells ahead and two cells to the right. The cell directly in front of me is floor (.), safe to step on. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal along a safe path: forward to (5,3), then forward to (4,3), then right and forward to G. I will move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a floor cell ('.'), which is safe to step on. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal 'G' that is visible two cells ahead and two cells to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (up in the view). The cell directly ahead is a wall (`#`), so moving forward is not possible. The goal (`G`) is located two cells to the east (right). There is a safe floor cell (`.`) immediately to the right. To reach the goal, I need to first turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells directly ahead of me (row 4, column 3). The cell immediately in front (row 5, column 3) is a safe floor tile. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without any danger.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly ahead of me. Moving forward will safely reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
